name: Hidden Albatross - Indoor Golf Simulator
about: Whether you’re practicing for the PGA Tour or picking up a golf club for the first time, Hidden Albatross Golf Simulator & Lounge offers a premier experience tailored to all skill levels. Perfect your swing with our state-of-the-art golf simulator. Beyond golf, enjoy a variety of family-friendly mini-games like darts, or par 3 challenge. Our spacious lounge is ideal for social gatherings, equipped with 5G high-speed Wi-Fi and ample seating.
who_its_for: All skill levels; families; groups; corporate meetings; casual golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Foresight Sports simulator, ability to bring your own group to a bay (price is by the hour, not per person), and membership perks.
food_and_drink: Snacks and non-alcoholic beverages available for purchase; outside snacks and non-alcoholic beverages allowed; No alcohol permitted.
pricing_model: Hourly rental; Memberships; League entry fees.
faq: Q: How do I get in? A: You will receive a unique access code for the front door lockbox before your session.
Q: Is alcohol allowed? A: No, alcohol is not permitted.
Q: Can I bring my own clubs? A: Yes, or use the ones available at the venue.
Q: Is there a grace period? A: Yes, 15 minutes.
